title: CSIDH: The Surviving Isogeny Scheme
description: Learn about CSIDH (Commutative SIDH), an isogeny-based scheme that survived the SIDH attack. Understand why its different design avoids the fatal flaw.
learningObjectives: Explain how CSIDH differs from SIDH
Understand why CSIDH survives the Castryck-Decru attack
Describe the class group action underlying CSIDH
Analyze CSIDH's performance and security tradeoffs
Compare CSIDH to other post-quantum schemes
